mapper.select:
SELECT e.STAFF_ID AS staffId, e.DEPT_ID AS deptId, e.NAME AS name, e.PHONE AS phone, e.EMAIL AS email, e.BIRTH_DATE AS birthDate, e.GENDER_CODE AS genderCode, e.ZIP_CODE AS zipCode, e.ADDRESS1 AS address1, e.ADDRESS2 AS address2, e.STATUS AS status,
d.DOCTOR_TYPE AS doctorType, n.NURSE_TYPE AS nurseType, r.RECEPTION_TYPE AS receptionType
FROM JCH.EMPLOYEE e LEFT JOIN JCH.EMPLOYEE_DOCTOR d ON e.STAFF_ID = d.STAFF_ID LEFT JOIN JCH.EMPLOYEE_NURSE n ON e.STAFF_ID = n.STAFF_ID LEFT JOIN JCH.EMPLOYEE_RECEPTION r ON e.STAFF_ID = r.STAFF_ID ORDER BY e.CREATED_AT DESC, e.STAFF_ID DESC

SELECT e.STAFF_ID AS staffId,
e.DEPT_ID AS deptId, e.NAME AS name, e.PHONE AS phone, e.EMAIL AS email, e.BIRTH_DATE AS birthDate, e.GENDER_CODE AS genderCode, e.ZIP_CODE AS zipCode, e.ADDRESS1 AS address1, e.ADDRESS2 AS address2, e.STATUS AS status,
d.DOCTOR_TYPE AS doctorType, n.NURSE_TYPE AS nurseType, r.RECEPTION_TYPE AS receptionType
FROM JCH.EMPLOYEE e
LEFT JOIN JCH.EMPLOYEE_DOCTOR d ON e.STAFF_ID = d.STAFF_ID
LEFT JOIN JCH.EMPLOYEE_NURSE n ON e.STAFF_ID = n.STAFF_ID
LEFT JOIN JCH.EMPLOYEE_RECEPTION r ON e.STAFF_ID = r.STAFF_ID
d.STAFF_ID IS NOT NULL
n.STAFF_ID IS NOT NULL
n.STAFF_ID IS NOT NULL
e.NAME LIKE '%' || #{search} || '%'
e.STAFF_ID LIKE '%' || #{search} || '%'
e.DEPT_ID LIKE '%' || #{search} || '%'
( e.NAME LIKE '%' || #{search} || '%' OR e.STAFF_ID LIKE '%' || #{search} || '%' OR e.DEPT_ID LIKE '%' || #{search} || '%' OR d.DOCTOR_TYPE LIKE '%' || #{search} || '%' OR n.NURSE_TYPE LIKE '%' || #{search} || '%' OR r.RECEPTION_TYPE LIKE '%' || #{search} || '%' )
ORDER BY e.STAFF_ID DESC
